messages.commandOwnerOnly: ⛔ | Only the bot owner can use this command.
messages.commandDevOnly: ⛔ | This command is restricted to developers.
messages.commandTestMode: ⛔ | This command is only available in the developer server.
messages.userNoPermissions: ⛔ | You do not have the required permissions to use this.
messages.botNoPermissions: ⛔ | I do not have the required permissions to execute this.
messages.commandOnCooldown: ⏳ | Please wait {time} seconds before using this again.
